---
title: "Probing structural transformations and degradation mechanisms by direct observation in SIFSIX-3-Ni for direct air capture"
date: "2024-03-01"
# We keep these metadata fields for the main listing page, 
# but we will hide the default header on this specific page.
author: 
  - M. L. Barsoum
  - J. Hofmann
  - H. Xie
  - Z. Chen
  - S. M. Vornholt
  - R. Dos Reis
image: "../../images/SIFSIX_TOC.jpeg"
---

```{style}
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}

.pub-container {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr 300px;
  gap: 30px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 40px;
}

.pub-index {
  font-size: 1.2em;
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #555;
}

.pub-url {
  font-size: 0.8em;
  display: block;
  margin-top: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #0366d6;
}

.pub-citation {
  font-size: 1.1em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.pub-toc img {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .pub-container {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 20px;
  }
}
